title: Ibrahim b. Hisham Leads the Pilgrimage
description: This year Ibrahim b. Hisham led the pilgrimage. I heard this from Ahmad b. Thabit-his informant Ishaq b. Isi--Abu Ma 'shar. Al-Wagidi and others said likewise. According to al-Wagidi: Ibrahim b. Hisham delivered the ser[i5o61 mon to the people at Mina20' in this year on the day after the Day of Sacrifice202 following the noon worship.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
